task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness VMS web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser is navigated to https://localhost:7001 and shows the Nx Witness VMS interface, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Set the custom role name to 'Night Shift Monitor'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the role creation or settings panel, the role name text field contains exactly 'Night Shift Monitor'.

task_completion.description: Enable live view and archive viewing permissions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes or toggles corresponding to 'View Live' (GlobalViewLivePermission) and 'View Archive' (GlobalViewArchivePermission) are checked or enabled for the new role.

task_completion.description: Ensure admin, export, and edit camera permissions are excluded
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes or toggles corresponding to Administrator, Export Video, and Edit Cameras are unchecked or disabled for the new role.

task_completion.description: Restrict role access to specific cameras
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the camera or resource access list for the role, ONLY 'Parking Lot Camera' and 'Entrance Camera' are selected or granted access. All other cameras or global resource access must be unselected.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to create the role
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Nx Witness VMS web interface in a browser, rather than executing API curl commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Nx Witness VMS
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the actual Nx Witness VMS (Network Optix) and not a text editor, local mock HTML file, or generic form.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's Inspect Element / Developer Tools being used to alter the text or state of the page to falsely show completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a role named 'Night Shift Monitor' at https://localhost:7001. The VLM should look for UI equivalents of the API permission strings: 'GlobalViewLivePermission' (e.g., View Live), 'GlobalViewArchivePermission' (e.g., View Archive), 'GlobalAdminPermission' (e.g., Administrator), 'GlobalExportPermission' (e.g., Export Video), and 'GlobalEditCamerasPermission' (e.g., Edit Cameras). Camera access must be explicitly restricted to 'Parking Lot Camera' and 'Entrance Camera'.
